text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I patrol the school hallways day in and day out,
but there seems to be no end to rule-breakers in
need of a warning...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So I've been thinking, what if this means I'm not
imposing enough? That would be a major
problem!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But how to be more imposing? Imposing, imposing... imposing... startling? Surprising...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's it! There's no surprise like a magic trick! Yeah, I just need to be a magician and a disciplinary officer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, can you help me learn some escape
magic tricks?!
